name: MiniTimer
v1_prompt: Implement {{binary_name}} as described in SPEC-v1.txt using {{language}}. The executable must be named '{{binary_name}}' and be runnable as python3 {{binary_name}}. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
v2_prompt: Read SPEC-v2.txt and extend the existing {{binary_name}} implementation with stop, log, and stats commands. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v2.sh
